name: auth-check
description: v0.5 middleware — header-based bearer-token check. Reads `Authorization: Bearer <token>`, asserts the token equals the literal value the workflow caller embeds in `X-Expected-Token` (demo only — real deployments swap this for JWT verify). On mismatch, throws a GlobalError with code 401 and a structured body that the trigger emits as the HTTP 401 response. On success, stashes the token at `ctx.state.identity` for downstream middleware/steps to read.

body.hint: set Authorization: Bearer <token> matching the X-Expected-Token header
